# Luna Law, PLLC

> Luna Law, PLLC is a South Florida law firm specializing in divorce, family law, and criminal defense, serving families throughout Miami-Dade and Broward Counties.

## About

- **Firm:** Luna Law, PLLC
- **Founding Attorney:** Hernan M. Luna, Esq.
- **Location:** Miami, Florida (serving Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach Counties)
- **Phone:** 1-800-868-5862
- **Email:** info@hlunalaw.com
- **Website:** https://hlunalaw.com
- **Languages:** English, Spanish (Se Habla Espanol)
- **Hours:** Monday through Sunday, 9am to 5pm

## Practice Areas

- Divorce (contested and uncontested)
- Child custody and parenting plans (time-sharing)
- Child support
- Alimony and spousal support
- Property and asset division
- Domestic violence injunctions
- Prenuptial and postnuptial agreements
- Post-divorce modifications
- Criminal defense (DUI, domestic violence, drug charges, theft, assault, probation violations)

## Credentials

- Member of The Florida Bar
- Florida Bar Family Law Section
- Florida Bar Criminal Law Section
- Admitted to the United States District Court for the Southern District of Florida
- Rated by Super Lawyers (2026)

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://hlunalaw.com/): Services overview, attorney bio, testimonials, credentials, contact information
- [About Luna Law](https://hlunalaw.com/about.html): Firm history, team members, philosophy, community partnerships
- [FAQ](https://hlunalaw.com/faq.html): Detailed answers to common Florida divorce, custody, alimony, property division, and criminal defense questions
- [Privacy Policy & Terms](https://hlunalaw.com/privacy-terms.html): SMS privacy statement and terms of service

## Consultations

Free confidential consultations are available by phone at 1-800-868-5862 or by scheduling online via Calendly at https://calendly.com/hernanlunalaw.
